ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each limit record */,
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metropolitan area */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the limits are applicable */,
  "single_family_limit" TEXT /* Price limit for single-family units */,
  "two_family_limit" TEXT /* Price limit for two-family units */,
  "three_family_limit" TEXT /* Price limit for three-family units */,
  "four_family_limit" TEXT /* Price limit for four-family units */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_limits_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_limits_metro_id FOREIGN KEY ("metro_id") REFERENCES metros ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metros" (
  "metro_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metropolitan area */,
  "metro_name" TEXT /* Name of the metropolitan area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metropolitan area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the metropolitan area */,
  "area_sqmi" TEXT /* Area of the metropolitan area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metro_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sqmi" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing limits record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_limit_id FOREIGN KEY ("limit_id") REFERENCES housing_limits ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related housing limits record */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the policy change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy change */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy change becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy change expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_limit_id FOREIGN KEY ("limit_id") REFERENCES housing_limits ("limit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county related to the trend */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend record */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price of housing in that year */,
  "price_change" TEXT /* Percentage change in average price from previous year */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Total sales volume for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
